## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check` passes on changed files
- [ ] Tested `check` and/or `crawl` against a real site (site-builder site if crawling/discovery changed)
- [ ] Non-info findings carry `evidence` (if this PR touches a check)
- [ ] decisions.md entry added for any non-obvious choice
- [ ] QUICKSTART.md updated if CLI flags changed
- [ ] No new dependencies — or the PR description argues why one is worth it
- [ ] Version numbers left alone (maintainer bumps at release)
